title: [release-1.35] tests/conformance/testdata/Dockerfile.add: update some URLs
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind failing-test 

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

The origin repository renamed its "master" branch to "main", so we need to update our references to items in that branch.  Cherry-picked from #6012.

#### How to verify it

The `TestConformance/add` conformance test should pass again.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
